evals.name: monthly-pnl-default-period
evals.prompt: Build me a P&L for this month using Scott's add-in. Use Kojo as usual. Include prior year same month and YTD columns.
evals.expected_output: An .xlsx workbook with an Inputs sheet (org 395536, current month period dates, PY same month, YTD) and a P&L sheet with revenue/COGS/expenses/net income, three amount columns, fully formatted.

evals.name: balance-sheet-with-py-compare
evals.prompt: I need a balance sheet workbook as of 3/31/2026 with a prior year comparison. Use Scott's functions please. Org is Kojo.
evals.expected_output: An .xlsx workbook with an Inputs sheet (org 395536, AsOf = 3/31/2026, PYAsOf = 3/31/2025) and a Balance Sheet with assets/liabilities/equity, two columns (current vs PY), proper sign conventions, balance check row.

evals.name: budget-vs-actual-q1
evals.prompt: Can you put together a budget vs. actual file for Q1 2026 using Scott's formulas? Budget version is 'Approved'. Kojo's org.
evals.expected_output: An .xlsx workbook with an Inputs sheet (org 395536, period 1/1/2026 - 3/31/2026, BudgetVersion = 'Approved') and a Budget vs Actual sheet with Actual/Budget/Variance$/Variance% columns, with the variance sign convention noted in handoff.
